TestCase z19Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n < 1) {
        // No elements to modify
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Operation: set a random element to its absolute value (if negative)
    int idx = rand() % follow_case.n;          // random index in [0, n-1]
    if (follow_case.a[idx] < 0) {
        follow_case.a[idx] = -follow_case.a[idx];
    }

    return follow_case;
}
